    • visitFREE_IDENT

      public boolean visitFREE_IDENT(FreeIdentifier ident)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Visits a FREE_IDENT node.
      Specified by:
      visitFREE_IDENT in interface IVisitor
      Overrides:
      visitFREE_IDENT in class DefaultVisitor
      Parameters:
      ident - the node to visit
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the siblings of the given node, true to continue visiting.
      See Also:
      • Formula.accept(IVisitor)

    • enterBECOMES_EQUAL_TO

      public boolean enterBECOMES_EQUAL_TO(BecomesEqualTo assign)
      Description copied from interface: IVisitor
      Enters a BECOMES_EQUAL_TO node.
      Specified by:
      enterBECOMES_EQUAL_TO in interface IVisitor
      Overrides:
      enterBECOMES_EQUAL_TO in class DefaultVisitor
      Parameters:
      assign - the node which is entered
      Returns:
      false to prevent visiting the children of the given node, true to continue visiting.

    • addOccIfVisible

    • getRodinLocation

      private static IInternalLocation getRodinLocation(Formula<?> formula)
      Returns the Rodin location for the given formula, assuming that the source location of the given formula contains an attribute location of type String.

      Note that when extracting a location from a SourceLocation, using this method is mandatory, as long as SourceLocation and IAttributeSubstringLocation do not share the same range convention.

      Parameters:
      formula - a formula
      Returns:
      the corresponding IInternalLocation
